title: Kwaggas shine at Switch Schools SA20 competition
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Although Outeniqua High School caused two major upsets in the pool stages of the Switch Schools SA20 competition, they could unfortunately not take their impressive performances to the business end of the competition.


> The representatives from the Western Cape in the boys and girls U19 leagues participated in the phase two qualifiers on 23 January.


Outeniqua (107/5) caused a major upset when they defeated one of the powerhouses in South African schools cricket, Wynberg Boys High (104/7), by five wickets.

They followed that up with a three-wicket victory against the eventual champions, Paarl Boys High (115/6) as they surpassed the target (118/7) in the last over.

Outeniqua was eventually knocked out by Paarl Gymnasium in the semi-final, losing by nine runs.

The other SWD team in the competition, the Bridgton Hub boys team, lost all their matches while the Bridgton Hub Girls U19 team lost by nine wickets in the final against Drostdy from Boland on 24 January.


## Summarised score cards:


Boys U19

Paarl Gymnasium beat Bridgton Hub with 59 runs:

Paarl Gymnasium 137/4 - 20 overs (Wian Munnik 35, Dirk Hugo 26, Matt Dippenaar 23, Lastio Williams 2/41, Jerwill van Wyngaard 1/23, Wilveno Meyer 1/18).

Bridgton Hub 76 all out - 15.5 overs. (Ducayne Plaatjies 18, Waldus de Jager 4/7, De Waal Vivier 2/7).

Outeniqua High School beat Wynberg Boys High by five wickets:

Wynberg Boys High 104/7 - 20 overs (Joshua Prince 28, M Tarentaal 26, Nathan Best 2/20, Matthew Coleman 1/11).

Outeniqua High School 107/5 - 18.5 overs (Daniel du Preez 35, Hanno Swart 20*, M Tarentaal 3/11, Fawaaz Hendricks 1/9).

Wynberg Boys High beat Bridgton Hub by eight wickets:

Bridgton Hub 104 all out - 20 overs (Ducayne Plaatjies 30, Keaton Lambaatjeen 29, Mario Tarentaal 27, Raihan Khan 3/9, M Tarentaal 2/15).

Wynberg Boys High 105/2 - 13.4 overs (M Tarentaal 71, Matthew Mills 23, S Plaatjies 1/11).

Outeniqua High School beat Paarl Boys High by three wickets:

Paarl Boys High 115/6 - 20 overs (Aden Batt 32*, Charl du Toit 21*, Matthew Coleman 2/14, Wernich Cassel 1/21).

Outeniqua High School 118/7 - 19.1 overs (Hanno Swart 35*, Wernich Cassel 18*, Ra-eez Isaacs 3/23, Ed Lee Koopman 1/15).

Paarl Gymnasium beat Outeniqua High School by nine wickets:

Outeniqua High School 94/7 - 20 overs (Matthew Coleman 27, Hanno Swart 19*, B Swanepoel 3/16, D Groenewald 2/16).

Paarl Gymnasium 96/1 - 12.5 overs (Wian Munnik 45*, Dirk Hugo 39, Liam Haasbroek 1/10).

Bishops beat Bridgton Hub by eight wickets:

Bridgton Hub 84 all out - 20 overs (Lastio Williams 21, Thaafier Japtha 2/19, Imraan Leith 2/19, Harry Morgan 2/8).

Bishops 85/2 - 8 overs (Ibraheem Taliep 47*, Ducayne Plaatjies 1/4).


## Semi-final


Paarl Gymnasium beat Outeniqua High School with nine runs:

Paarl Gymnasium 173/6 - 20 overs (Wian Munnik 74, De Waal Vivier 25, Dirk Hugo 21, Nathan Best 2/29, J Oosthuizen 1/27, Hanno Swart 1/26).

Outeniqua High School 165/3 - overs (Daniel du Preez 82*, Daniel du Plessis 31, Matthew Coleman 25*, De Waal Vivier 1/19, B Swanepoel 1/30).


## Girls U19


Stellenberg High School beat Bridgton Hub with 17 runs:

Stellenberg High School 103/9 - 20 overs (Chloe de Roubaix 28, Kaylin Erasmus 17, Mi-Jeanne Botha 2/11, Caroldene Ewerts 2/13).

Bridgton Hub 87/6 - 20 overs (Mi-Jeanne Botga 41, Storm van Dyk 3/12, Nakeeta Collins 2/6).

HTS Drostdy Girls beat Bridgton Hub Girls with 38 runs:

HTS Drostdy Girls 138/6 - 20 overs (Daneli Boshoff 62, Lize de Waal 24, Jolene Agulus 3/24, Alicia Booysen 2/38). HTS Drostdy won by .


## Final


Drostdy Girls beat Bridgton Hub Girls by nine wickets:

Bridgton Hub Girls 25 all out - 9.2 overs (Mi-Jeanne Botha 7, Lize de Waal 4/8, Linique Luck 4/5).

Drostdy Girls 26/1 - 3 overs (Lize de Waal 10*).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
